description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and defines variables ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK='33', ANDROID_NDK_VERSION='21', ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=33.0.1, ANDROID_SDK_VERSION='3859397', NDK_VER=21.4.7075529 and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive. Add a global before_script that updates apt, installs libncurses5 curl libarchive-tools, creates an android-sdk directory, downloads the Android SDK tools zip for ${ANDROID_SDK_VERSION} if missing, sets ANDROID_SDK_HOME, ANDROID_HOME, NDK_HOME, ANDROID_NDK, updates PATH, grants permissions, creates a dummy repositories.cfg, accepts all sdkmanager licenses, installs build‑tools ${ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS}, platform‑tools, platforms;android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, ndk;$NDK_VER and ndk-bundle;$NDK_VER, lists the SDK directories and creates a symlink for the NDK. Configure a cache keyed by s${ANDROID_SDK_VERSION}-n${ANDROID_NDK_VERSION} that stores .gradle and android-sdk. Define a single stage called build with a build job that runs TARGET_BUILD_APPS=true ./gradlew assembleDebug, and publishes the build/outputs/ directory as an artifact.
